creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Alexander Vereeken from comment #3)

The policy is: unless there's a specific framework for it (as e.g. with Python and the PORTDOCS/PORTDATA stuff) we strongly prefer explicit pack lists.

Main exceptions include when the packlist contains random generated identifiers or when it's *really* large.  But these cases should be discussed on a case to case basis.  I'll go ahead and put your updated patch in my next batch.
